1739(1)
map {'35': 'Sanctuary: Temporarily increase your Defence level by 8.', '805': 'Chainhit: Throw an axe which hits your target and then chains to hit further nearby targets, costing 10% additional special attack per extra target.', '859': 'Powershot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target.', '861': 'Snapshot: Fire two arrows within quick succession, but with reduced accuracy.', '1215': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '1231': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '1249': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '1263': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '1305': 'Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts 25% more damage.', '1377': 'Rampage: Drain your Attack, Defence, Ranged & Magic levels by 10%, while increasing your Strength by 10 levels, plus 25% of the drained levels.', '1434': 'Shatter: Increase damage by 50% and accuracy by 25% for one hit.', '3101': 'Impale: Deal an attack with 10% increased Attack and Strength, but with a slower speed.', '3176': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '3204': 'Sweep: If your target is small, adjacent targets may be hit too. Otherwise, your target may be hit a second time, with 25% decreased accuracy. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.', '4151': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '4153': 'Quick Smash: Deal an extra attack instantly.', '4587': 'Sever: Deal a slash with increased accuracy that prevents your target from using protection prayers for 5 seconds if it successfully hits.', '5680': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '5698': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '5716': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '5730': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '6724': 'Soulshot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target and lowers your target's Magic level by the damage dealt.', '6739': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '6746': 'Weaken: Temporarily drain your target's Attack, Strength and Defence by 5%. Is twice as effective against demons.', '7158': 'Powerstab: Hit up to fourteen enemies surrounding you.', '7639': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7640': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7641': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7642': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7643': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7644': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7645': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7646': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7647': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '7648': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '8872': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8874': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8876': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8878': 'Backstab: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '8880': 'Snipe: Deal an attack with greatly increased accuracy on unsuspecting targets and that lowers your target's Defence level by the damage dealt.', '10284': 'Powershot: Deal an attack that is guaranteed to hit your target.', '10887': 'Sunder: Deal an attack with double accuracy and 10% higher max hit. Lowers your target's Attack, Defence, Ranged or Magic level by 10% of the damage dealt.', '11037': 'Liquify: Deal an attack with double the chance of hitting that boosts your Strength, Attack and Defence levels by 25% of the damage dealt. Can only be used underwater.', '11061': 'Favour of the War God: Deal an attack which hits through Protect from Melee and siphons Prayer points equal to the damage dealt.', '11235': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '11785': 'Armadyl Eye: Deal an attack with double accuracy, also doubles the base activation chance of enchanted bolt effects.', '11791': 'Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '11802': 'The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts 37.5% more damage with double accuracy.', '11804': 'Warstrike: Deal an attack, with double accuracy, that inflicts 21% more damage and drains one of your target's combat stats by the damage dealt.', '11806': 'Healing Blade: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy, while restoring your Hitpoints and Prayer by 50% and 25% of the damage dealt respectively.', '11808': 'Ice Cleave: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and freezes your target for 20 seconds if it successfully hits.', '11824': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '11838': 'Saradomin's Lightning: Call upon Saradomin's power to perform an attack that inflicts 10% more melee damage and 1-16 extra magic damage.', '11889': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '11920': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '12006': 'Binding Tentacle: Bind your target for 5 seconds and increase the chance of them being poisoned.', '12765': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '12766': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '12767': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '12768': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '12773': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '12774': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '12788': 'Snapshot: Fire two arrows within quick succession, but with reduced accuracy.', '12797': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '12808': 'Saradomin's Lightning: Call upon Saradomin's power to perform an attack with 25% higher max hit.', '12809': 'Saradomin's Lightning: Call upon Saradomin's power to perform an attack with 25% higher max hit.', '12848': 'Quick Smash: Deal an extra attack instantly.', '12902': 'Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '12904': 'Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '12926': 'Toxic Siphon: Deal an attack with 100% increased accuracy that inflicts 50% more damage and heals you for 50% of the damage dealt.', '13241': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '13242': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '13243': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '13244': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '13263': 'Penance: Deal an attack that inflicts 0.5% more damage per prayer point that you have used.', '13265': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 15% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '13267': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 15% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '13269': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 15% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '13271': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 15% less damage per hit. 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '20014': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '20368': 'The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts 37.5% more damage with double accuracy.', '20370': 'Warstrike: Deal an attack, with double accuracy, that inflicts 21% more damage and drains one of your target's combat stats by the damage dealt.', '20372': 'Healing Blade: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy, while restoring your Hitpoints and Prayer by 50% and 25% of the damage dealt respectively.', '20374': 'Ice Cleave: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and freezes your target for 20 seconds if it successfully hits.', '20405': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '20406': 'Sever: Deal a slash with increased accuracy that can prevent your target from using protection prayers for 5 seconds.', '20407': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '20408': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 5 per hit).', '20557': 'Quick Smash: melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '22398': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '22516': 'Pulsate: Fire an incredibly powerful burst of energy.', '22610': 'Spear Wall: All damage dealt by this attack is reduced by 50%, but will damage up to sixteen targets surrounding you. After using this attack, you will be immune from melee attacks for 5 seconds.', '22613': 'Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.', '22622': 'Smash: Deal an attack which deals a minimum of 25% extra damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '22634': 'Hamstring: Deal a minimum of 20% extra damage and hamstring player targets, causing them to lose run energy 6x faster for 1 minute.', '22636': 'Phantom Strike: This does nothing vs non-player targets. As well as dealing a regular attack, your target will suffer that damage again over time.', '22731': 'Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.', '22734': 'Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.', '22737': 'Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.', '22740': 'Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.', '22743': 'Unleash: Deal an attack which has 5% increased accuracy and 2.5% increased strength per 5% of the special attack bar used.', '22804': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '22806': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '22808': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '22810': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '23611': 'Armadyl Eye: Deal an attack with double accuracy, also doubles the base activation chance of enchanted bolt effects.', '23613': 'Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '23615': 'Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.', '23619': 'Phantom Strike: This does nothing vs non-player targets. As well as dealing a regular attack, your target will suffer that damage again over time.', '23620': 'Smash: Deal an attack which deals a minimum of 25% extra damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '23630': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '23673': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '23675': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '23677': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '23680': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '23682': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '23762': 'Fishstabber: Increase your Fishing level by 3.', '23764': 'Fishstabber: Increase your Fishing level by 3.', '23987': 'Sweep: If your target is small, adjacent targets may be hit too. Otherwise, your target may be hit a second time, with 25% decreased accuracy. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.', '24125': 'Sweep: If your target is small, adjacent targets may be hit too. Otherwise, your target may be hit a second time, with 25% decreased accuracy. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.', '24144': 'Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '24225': 'Quick Smash: Deal an extra attack instantly.', '24227': 'Quick Smash: Deal an extra attack instantly.', '24424': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.', '24425': 'Invocate: Fire a powerful spell that restores your prayer points by 50% of the damage dealt. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Your prayer points can go above your level, to a maximum of 120. Costs no runes to use.', '24617': 'Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.', '24699': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '25110': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '25112': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '25114': 'Fishstabber: Increase your Fishing level by 3.', '25517': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.', '26219': 'Eviscerate: Perform an attack with your true maximum hit and a 50% accuracy bonus.', '26233': 'Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. Targets marked for a blood sacrifice will be hit for 25 damage after a short delay, unless they move away. If they are hit, you'll also be healed for the damage dealt.', '26374': 'Evoke: Perform an attack with double accuracy, with a guaranteed enchanted bolt activation rate on successful hit.', '26482': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '26484': 'Binding Tentacle: Bind your target for 5 seconds and increase the chance of them being poisoned.', '26708': 'Slice and Dice: Hit 4 times in quick succession, with great accuracy.', '26710': 'Smash: Deal an attack that inflicts 50% more damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '26712': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '27157': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '27184': 'Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. Targets marked for a blood sacrifice will be hit for 25 damage after a short delay, unless they move away. If they are hit, you'll also be healed for the damage dealt.', '27186': 'Evoke: Perform an attack with double accuracy, with a guaranteed enchanted bolt activation rate on successful hit.', '27188': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '27246': 'Eviscerate: Perform an attack with your true maximum hit and a 50% accuracy bonus.', '27287': 'Wrath of Amascut: Perform an attack with 100% increased accuracy and 25% increased damage, but with halved attack speed. If hit, the opponent will take 25% increased damage for the next 6 seconds. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.', '27291': 'Tumeken's Light: Sacrifice 50 prayer points to restore your hitpoints to 20% above their maximum, cure all poison, restore all drained stats (except prayer) and fully restore your run energy. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.', '27655': 'Swarm: Fire 4 times in quick succession, dealing reduced damage and inflicting poison.', '27660': 'Bear Down: Perform an attack with double accuracy, dealing additional damage over time, draining your target's agility level and preventing them from running.', '27665': 'Condemn: Fire a powerful spell with increased accuracy and damage, lowering your target's magic and defence levels by up to 15%.', '27679': 'Condemn: Fire a powerful spell with increased accuracy and damage, lowering your target's magic and defence levels by up to 15%.', '27690': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '27810': 'Celebrate: Perform an attack to leave the area feeling more festive.', '27853': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 7 per hit).', '27855': 'Sunder: Deal an attack with double accuracy and 25% higher max hit. Lowers your target's Attack, Defence, Ranged or Magic level by 10% of the damage dealt.', '27857': 'Shatter: Increase damage by 50% and accuracy by 25% for one hit, treats your target's defence as if it was reduced to 60%.', '27859': 'Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts 25% more damage with 25% increased accuracy and increased speed.', '27861': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. As well as dealing a regular attack, your target will suffer that damage again over time.', '23620': 'Smash: Deal an attack which deals a minimum of 25% extra damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '23630': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '23673': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '23675': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '23677': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '23680': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '23682': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '23762': 'Fishstabber: Increase your Fishing level by 3.', '23764': 'Fishstabber: Increase your Fishing level by 3.', '23987': 'Sweep: If your target is small, adjacent targets may be hit too. Otherwise, your target may be hit a second time, with 25% decreased accuracy. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.', '24125': 'Sweep: If your target is small, adjacent targets may be hit too. Otherwise, your target may be hit a second time, with 25% decreased accuracy. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.', '24144': 'Power of Death: Reduce all melee damage you receive by 50% for the next minute while the staff remains equipped. Stacks with Protect from Melee.', '24225': 'Quick Smash: Deal an extra attack instantly.', '24227': 'Quick Smash: Deal an extra attack instantly.', '24424': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.', '24425': 'Invocate: Fire a powerful spell that restores your prayer points by 50% of the damage dealt. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Your prayer points can go above your level, to a maximum of 120. Costs no runes to use.', '24617': 'Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.', '24699': 'Retainer: Traps a vampyre juvenile or juvinate provided they have 50% or less hitpoints remaining.', '25110': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '25112': 'Rock Knocker: Increase your Mining level by 3.', '25114': 'Fishstabber: Increase your Fishing level by 3.', '25517': 'Immolate: Fire a powerful spell with 50% improved accuracy. Damage scales based upon magic level and can be increased with magic damage boosting equipment. Costs no runes to use.', '26219': 'Eviscerate: Perform an attack with your true maximum hit and a 50% accuracy bonus.', '26233': 'Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. Targets marked for a blood sacrifice will be hit for 25 damage after a short delay, unless they move away. If they are hit, you'll also be healed for the damage dealt.', '26374': 'Evoke: Perform an attack with double accuracy, with a guaranteed enchanted bolt activation rate on successful hit.', '26482': 'Energy Drain: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy that siphons 10% of your target's run energy.', '26484': 'Binding Tentacle: Bind your target for 5 seconds and increase the chance of them being poisoned.', '26708': 'Slice and Dice: Hit 4 times in quick succession, with great accuracy.', '26710': 'Smash: Deal an attack that inflicts 50% more damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '26712': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '27157': 'Duality: Throws two knives at your opponent.', '27184': 'Blood Sacrifice: Deal an attack that inflicts 10% more damage with double accuracy and marks your target for a blood sacrifice. Targets marked for a blood sacrifice will be hit for 25 damage after a short delay, unless they move away. If they are hit, you'll also be healed for the damage dealt.', '27186': 'Evoke: Perform an attack with double accuracy, with a guaranteed enchanted bolt activation rate on successful hit.', '27188': 'Concentrated Shot: Deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, but takes an additional 2.4 seconds to fire.', '27246': 'Eviscerate: Perform an attack with your true maximum hit and a 50% accuracy bonus.', '27287': 'Wrath of Amascut: Perform an attack with 100% increased accuracy and 25% increased damage, but with halved attack speed. If hit, the opponent will take 25% increased damage for the next 6 seconds. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.', '27291': 'Tumeken's Light: Sacrifice 50 prayer points to restore your hitpoints to 20% above their maximum, cure all poison, restore all drained stats (except prayer) and fully restore your run energy. This special attack can only be used within the Tombs of Amascut.', '27655': 'Swarm: Fire 4 times in quick succession, dealing reduced damage and inflicting poison.', '27660': 'Bear Down: Perform an attack with double accuracy, dealing additional damage over time, draining your target's agility level and preventing them from running.', '27665': 'Condemn: Fire a powerful spell with increased accuracy and damage, lowering your target's magic and defence levels by up to 15%.', '27679': 'Condemn: Fire a powerful spell with increased accuracy and damage, lowering your target's magic and defence levels by up to 15%.', '27690': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '27810': 'Celebrate: Perform an attack to leave the area feeling more festive.', '27853': 'Descent of Darkness: Deal a double attack that inflicts up to 30% more damage (minimum damage of 7 per hit).', '27855': 'Sunder: Deal an attack with double accuracy and 25% higher max hit. Lowers your target's Attack, Defence, Ranged or Magic level by 10% of the damage dealt.', '27857': 'Shatter: Increase damage by 50% and accuracy by 25% for one hit, treats your target's defence as if it was reduced to 60%.', '27859': 'Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts 25% more damage with 25% increased accuracy and increased speed.', '27861': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '27863': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '27865': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '27867': 'Abyssal Puncture: Deal an attack that hits twice with 25% increased accuracy, but inflicts 5% less damage per hit. The second hit is guaranteed if the first deals damage.', '27869': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '27900': 'Spear Wall: Will hit twice with second hit deals a damage between 25% - 75% of the first hit damage. After using this attack, you will be immune from melee attacks for 5 seconds.', '27904': 'Feint: Deal an attack which treats your target's defence as if it was reduced by 75%. It will deal a minimum of 20% extra damage.', '27908': 'Smash: Deal an attack which deals a minimum of 25% extra damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '27912': 'Hamstring: Deal a minimum of 20% extra damage and hamstring player targets, causing them to lose run energy 6x faster for 1 minute.', '27916': 'Phantom Strike: This does nothing vs non-player targets. As well as dealing a regular attack, your target will suffer that damage again over time.', '28019': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '28021': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '28023': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '28025': 'Puncture: Deal two quick slashes with 15% increased accuracy and 15% increased damage.', '28027': 'Shatter: Increase damage by 50% and accuracy by 25% for one hit.', '28029': 'Wild Stab: Deal an attack which hits through Protect from Melee with 25% increased accuracy and damage.', '28031': 'Sever: Deal a slash with increased accuracy that prevents your target from using protection prayers for 5 seconds if it successfully hits.', '28033': 'Cleave: Deal a powerful attack that inflicts 25% more damage.', '28035': 'Smash: Deal an attack that inflicts 50% more damage and lowers your target's Defence level by 30%.', '28037': 'Rampage: Drain your Attack, Defence, Ranged & Magic levels by 10%, while increasing your Strength by 10 levels, plus 25% of the drained levels.', '28039': 'Slice and Dice: Hit 4 times in quick succession, with great accuracy.', '28041': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '28043': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '28045': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '28047': 'Shove: Push your target back and stun them for 3 seconds. This attack deals no damage.', '28049': 'Sweep: If your target is small, adjacent targets may be hit too. Otherwise, your target may be hit a second time, with 25% decreased accuracy. Damage in all cases is increased by 10% of your max hit.', '28051': 'Powerstab: Hit up to fourteen enemies surrounding you.', '28053': 'Annihilate: Hit your target with 20% extra damage and in multicombat zones, hit all adjacent targets by 20% less damage.', '28217': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28220': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28223': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28226': 'Lumber Up: Increase your Woodcutting level by 3.', '28338': 'Behead: Consume all Soul Stacks, attacking with increased damage and accuracy per stack, and healing for 8 health per stack.', '28531': 'Disrupt: Summon a powerful bolt of lightning that deals guaranteed magic damage based on your max hit.', '28534': 'Slice and Dice: Hit 4 times in quick succession, with great accuracy.', '28537': 'The Judgement: Deal an attack that inflicts 37.5% more damage with double accuracy.', '28682': 'Shield Bash: Hit surrounding targets within a 10x10 area with 20% increased accuracy.', '28688': 'Toxic Siphon: Deal an attack with 100% increased accuracy that inflicts 50% more damage and heals you for 50% of the damage dealt.', '28919': 'Division: Fire a powerful piercing blade that reduces the targets Defence by 10% of their Magic Level.', '28922': 'Division: Fire a powerful piercing blade that reduces the targets Defence by 10% of their Magic Level.', '28988': 'Break Shackles: Attack with increased accuracy and damage based on the duration of any binding spells affecting them and ending said effect. This special attack requires the full Frostmoon set to be worn.', '28997': 'Blood infusion: Sacrifice 25% of your current hp to deal an attack with 25% increased accuracy and damage, with a guaranteed set effect activation on hit. This special attack requires the full Bloodrager set to be worn.', '29000': 'Eclipse: Attack with 50% increased accuracy, consuming all remaining burn damage affecting the target and raising the max hit by that amount. This special attack requires the full Eclipse set to be worn.'}
1796(1)
map {'0': 'north', '1': 'east', '2': 'south', '3': 'west', '4': 'north-east', '5': 'south-east', '6': 'south-west', '7': 'north-west'} {'0': 'north', '1': 'east', '2': 'south', '3': 'west', '4': 'north east', '5': 'south east', '6': 'south west', '7': 'north west'}

map {'1': 853, '2': 31104, '3': 28480, '4': 14617, '5': 15106} {'1': 853, '2': 31104, '3': 28480, '4': 14617, '5': 15106, '6': 15393, '7': 21407, '8': 30242}
3047(1)
map {'0': , '1': '<col=ffffff>Ahrim The Blighted:

Blighted Aura:

Magic Attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's strength level by 5 on a successful hit.

', '2': '<col=ffffff>Dharok the Wretched:

Wretched Strength:

Attacks do more damage as your hitpoints decrease. For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, you deal 1% more damage.

', '3': '<col=ffffff>Guthan the Infested:

Infestation:

Attacks have a 25% chance of replenishing your health equal to the damage you deal.

', '4': '<col=ffffff>Karil the Tainted:

Tainted Shot:

Successful range attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's agility stat by 20%.

', '5': '<col=ffffff>Torag the Corrupted:

Corruption:

Successful melee attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the victim's run energy by 20%.

', '6': '<col=ffffff>Verac the Defiled:

Defiler:

Attacks have a 25% chance of ignoring any armour, Defence, and protection prayers.

', '7': '<col=ffffff>Inquisitor's armour:

Each individual piece of Inquisitor's armour boosts damage and accuracy by 0.5% when using the crush attack style.

If all pieces of the Inquisitor's armour are worn, this bonus is increased to 2.5%.

', '8': '<col=ffffff>Graceful Outfit:

Each individual piece of the Graceful Outfit increases your run restoration rate.

Wearing the full Graceful Outfit increases run energy restoration by 30%.

', '9': '<col=ffffff>Obsidian armour:

All obsidian weaponry will be given a 10% boost in melee accuracy and melee strength.

', '10': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Melee:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Melee Helmet, you will receive +10% bonus to your melee damage and accuracy.

', '11': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Range:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Ranger Helmet, you will receive +10% bonus to your ranged damage and accuracy.

', '12': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Elite Range:

When wearing the Elite Void Top, Elite Robe, Gloves and Ranger Helmet, you will receive +12.5% bonus to your ranged damage and 10% bonus to accuracy.

', '13': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Mage:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Mage Helmet, you will receive +45% bonus to your magic accuracy.

', '14': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Elite Mage:

When wearing the Elite Void Top, Elite Robe, Gloves and Mage Helmet, you will receive a +45% bonus to your magic accuracy and 2.5% to your magic damage.

', '15': '<col=ffffff>Justiciar:

PvM damage dealt to you is reduced according to your total armour protection in that style.

', '16': '<col=ffffff>Angler outfit:

XP from training Fishing will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '17': '<col=ffffff>Lumberjack outfit:

XP from training Woodcutting will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '18': '<col=ffffff>Prospector outfit:

XP from training Mining will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '19': '<col=ffffff>Farmer outfit:

XP from training Farming will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '20': '<col=ffffff>Pyromancer outfit:

XP from training Firemaking will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '21': '<col=ffffff>Shayzien armour:

Reduces the damage of the acid splash attack used by Lizardman Shamans.

', '22': '<col=ffffff>Rogue kit:

The full set gives a 100% chance of double loot from standard pickpocketing. Incomplete sets give smaller chances.

', '23': '<col=ffffff>Carpenter's outfit:

XP from training Construction will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '24': '<col=ffffff>Crystal armour:

Each individual piece of Crystal Armour increases your accuracy and damage with crystal ranged weaponry.

Wearing the full set of Crystal Armour increases accuracy by 30% and damage by 15%.

', '25': '<col=ffffff>Swampbark Armour:

Wearing the helm, body, and legs increases the duration of Bind, Snare and Entangle spells by 3.6 seconds

', '26': '<col=ffffff>Bloodbark Armour:

The full set increases the amount healed by Blood spells to 35.0%.

', '27': '<col=ffffff>Zealot's prayer robes:

The full set grants a 5% chance of saving ensouled heads when reanimating them, bones when burying or offering them, and bonemeal & slime at the Ectofuntus. This stacks with the Wilderness altar's bone saving effect.

', '28': '<col=ffffff>Spirit Angler outfit:

XP from training Fishing will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

Full set acts as a tether rope when fighting Tempoross.

', '29': '<col=ffffff>Virtus Robes:

9% increased Magic damage with ancient spells.

Smoke spells reduce healing received by 30%, as long as the target is poisoned.

Shadow spells also drain Strength, Ranged, Magic and Defence, as well as Attack.

Blood spells can heal up to 20% over your maximum hitpoints.

Ice spells gain 10% additional accuracy against frozen targets.', '30': '<col=ffffff>Raiments of the Eye:

Runes crafted are increased by 60%.

This bonus stacks additively with other similar effects.

', '31': '<col=ffffff>Smith's Uniform:

The full set increases the rate you will smith items at an anvil by 1 tick.

', '32': '<col=ffffff>Statius's Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '33': '<col=ffffff>Vesta's Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '34': '<col=ffffff>Morrigan's Equipment:

Ranged special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '35': '<col=ffffff>Zuriel's Equipment:

Magic special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '36': '<col=ffffff>Statius's Corrupt Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '37': '<col=ffffff>Vesta's Corrupt Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '38': '<col=ffffff>Morrigan's Corrupt Equipment:

Ranged special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '39': '<col=ffffff>Zuriel's Corrupt Equipment:

Magic special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '2001': '<col=ffffff>Ahrim The Blighted:

Blighted Aura +:

Magic Attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's strength level by 5 on a successful hit.

If the spell is autocast, it gets a 30% damage bonus.

', '2002': '<col=ffffff>Dharok the Wretched:

Wretched Strength +:

Attacks do more damage as your hitpoints decrease. For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, you deal 1% more damage.

When you take damage, you have a 1/4 chance of reflecting 15% of the damage to your opponent.

', '2003': '<col=ffffff>Guthan the Infested:

Infestation +:

Attacks have a 25% chance of replenishing your health equal to the damage you deal.

This can boost your hitpoints by up to 10.

', '2004': '<col=ffffff>Karil the Tainted:

Tainted Shot +:

Successful range attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's agility stat by 20%.

A second hitplat is applied in PvP, dealing half the damage of the first.

', '2005': '<col=ffffff>Torag the Corrupted:

Corruption +:

Successful melee attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the victim's run energy by 20%.

For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, your Defence stat gets an invisible boost.

', '2006': '<col=ffffff>Verac the Defiled:

Defiler +:

Attacks have a 25% chance of ignoring any armour, Defence, and protection prayers.

Gives a +7 prayer bonus.

'}		 {'0': , '1': '<col=ffffff>Ahrim The Blighted:

Blighted Aura:

Magic Attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's strength level by 5 on a successful hit.

', '2': '<col=ffffff>Dharok the Wretched:

Wretched Strength:

Attacks do more damage as your hitpoints decrease. For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, you deal 1% more damage.

', '3': '<col=ffffff>Guthan the Infested:

Infestation:

Attacks have a 25% chance of replenishing your health equal to the damage you deal.

', '4': '<col=ffffff>Karil the Tainted:

Tainted Shot:

Successful range attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's agility stat by 20%.

', '5': '<col=ffffff>Torag the Corrupted:

Corruption:

Successful melee attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the victim's run energy by 20%.

', '6': '<col=ffffff>Verac the Defiled:

Defiler:

Attacks have a 25% chance of ignoring any armour, Defence, and protection prayers.

', '7': '<col=ffffff>Inquisitor's armour:

Each individual piece of Inquisitor's armour boosts damage and accuracy by 0.5% when using the crush attack style.

If all pieces of the Inquisitor's armour are worn, this bonus is increased to 2.5%.

', '8': '<col=ffffff>Graceful Outfit:

Each individual piece of the Graceful Outfit increases your run restoration rate.

Wearing the full Graceful Outfit increases run energy restoration by 30%.

', '9': '<col=ffffff>Obsidian armour:

All obsidian weaponry will be given a 10% boost in melee accuracy and melee strength.

', '10': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Melee:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Melee Helmet, you will receive +10% bonus to your melee damage and accuracy.

', '11': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Range:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Ranger Helmet, you will receive +10% bonus to your ranged damage and accuracy.

', '12': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Elite Range:

When wearing the Elite Void Top, Elite Robe, Gloves and Ranger Helmet, you will receive +12.5% bonus to your ranged damage and 10% bonus to accuracy.

', '13': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Mage:

When wearing the Void Top, Robe, Gloves and Mage Helmet, you will receive +45% bonus to your magic accuracy.

', '14': '<col=ffffff>Void Knight Elite Mage:

When wearing the Elite Void Top, Elite Robe, Gloves and Mage Helmet, you will receive a +45% bonus to your magic accuracy and 2.5% to your magic damage.

', '15': '<col=ffffff>Justiciar:

PvM damage dealt to you is reduced according to your total armour protection in that style.

', '16': '<col=ffffff>Angler outfit:

XP from training Fishing will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '17': '<col=ffffff>Lumberjack outfit:

XP from training Woodcutting will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '18': '<col=ffffff>Prospector outfit:

XP from training Mining will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '19': '<col=ffffff>Farmer outfit:

XP from training Farming will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '20': '<col=ffffff>Pyromancer outfit:

XP from training Firemaking will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '21': '<col=ffffff>Shayzien armour:

Reduces the damage of the acid splash attack used by Lizardman Shamans.

', '22': '<col=ffffff>Rogue kit:

The full set gives a 100% chance of double loot from standard pickpocketing. Incomplete sets give smaller chances.

', '23': '<col=ffffff>Carpenter's outfit:

XP from training Construction will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

', '24': '<col=ffffff>Crystal armour:

Each individual piece of Crystal Armour increases your accuracy and damage with crystal ranged weaponry.

Wearing the full set of Crystal Armour increases accuracy by 30% and damage by 15%.

', '25': '<col=ffffff>Swampbark Armour:

Wearing the helm, body, and legs increases the duration of Bind, Snare and Entangle spells by 3.6 seconds

', '26': '<col=ffffff>Bloodbark Armour:

The full set increases the amount healed by Blood spells to 35.0%.

', '27': '<col=ffffff>Zealot's prayer robes:

The full set grants a 5% chance of saving ensouled heads when reanimating them, bones when burying or offering them, and bonemeal & slime at the Ectofuntus. This stacks with the Wilderness altar's bone saving effect.

', '28': '<col=ffffff>Spirit Angler outfit:

XP from training Fishing will be increased by 2.5% if the full set is worn. Incomplete sets give smaller bonuses.

Full set acts as a tether rope when fighting Tempoross.

', '29': '<col=ffffff>Virtus Robes:

9% increased Magic damage with ancient spells.

Smoke spells reduce healing received by 30%, as long as the target is poisoned.

Shadow spells also drain Strength, Ranged, Magic and Defence, as well as Attack.

Blood spells can heal up to 20% over your maximum hitpoints.

Ice spells gain 10% additional accuracy against frozen targets.', '30': '<col=ffffff>Raiments of the Eye:

Runes crafted are increased by 60%.

This bonus stacks additively with other similar effects.

', '31': '<col=ffffff>Smith's Uniform:

The full set increases the rate you will smith items at an anvil by 1 tick.

', '32': '<col=ffffff>Statius's Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '33': '<col=ffffff>Vesta's Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '34': '<col=ffffff>Morrigan's Equipment:

Ranged special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '35': '<col=ffffff>Zuriel's Equipment:

Magic special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '36': '<col=ffffff>Statius's Corrupt Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '37': '<col=ffffff>Vesta's Corrupt Equipment:

Melee special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '38': '<col=ffffff>Morrigan's Corrupt Equipment:

Ranged special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '39': '<col=ffffff>Zuriel's Corrupt Equipment:

Magic special attacks have 15% increased accuracy.

', '40': '<col=ffffff>Bloodrager Effect:

Successful hits with the Dual Macuahuitl have a 33% chance of reducing the delay of your next attack by 1 tick.

The Dual Macuahuitl gains the 'Blood Infusion' special attack.

', '41': '<col=ffffff>Frostweaver Effect:

Casting spells which bind the enemy has a 50% chance to allow the next attack with the Blue moon spear to bypass the action delay.

The Blue Moon Spear gains the 'Break Shackles' special attack.

', '42': '<col=ffffff>Frostweaver Effect Set:

Casting spells which bind the enemy has a 20% chance to allow the next attack with the Blue moon spear to bypass the action delay.

The Blue Moon Spear gains the 'Break Shackles' special attack.

', '43': '<col=ffffff>Eclipse Effect:

Successful hits with the Eclipse Atlatl have a 20% chance to apply a burn effect to the enemy.

The Eclipse Atlatl gains the 'Eclipse' special attack.

', '2001': '<col=ffffff>Ahrim The Blighted:

Blighted Aura +:

Magic Attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's strength level by 5 on a successful hit.

If the spell is autocast, it gets a 30% damage bonus.

', '2002': '<col=ffffff>Dharok the Wretched:

Wretched Strength +:

Attacks do more damage as your hitpoints decrease. For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, you deal 1% more damage.

When you take damage, you have a 1/4 chance of reflecting 15% of the damage to your opponent.

', '2003': '<col=ffffff>Guthan the Infested:

Infestation +:

Attacks have a 25% chance of replenishing your health equal to the damage you deal.

This can boost your hitpoints by up to 10.

', '2004': '<col=ffffff>Karil the Tainted:

Tainted Shot +:

Successful range attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the enemy's agility stat by 20%.

A second hitplat is applied in PvP, dealing half the damage of the first.

', '2005': '<col=ffffff>Torag the Corrupted:

Corruption +:

Successful melee attacks have a 25% chance of lowering the victim's run energy by 20%.

For every hitpoint lost from your maximum hitpoints, your Defence stat gets an invisible boost.

', '2006': '<col=ffffff>Verac the Defiled:

Defiler +:

Attacks have a 25% chance of ignoring any armour, Defence, and protection prayers.

Gives a +7 prayer bonus.

'}

890(1) {'1895': 0, '1896': 'The Doom Scorpion', '1897': 'The Doom Scorpion continually spawns and hits for two stacks of doom. Certain death after 20 stacks.', '1898': 'The Doom Scorpion continually spawns, moves faster, and hits for four stacks of doom. Certain death after 20 stacks.', '1899': 'The Doom Scorpion continually spawns, moves very fast, and hits for eight stacks of doom. Certain death after 20 stacks.', '1900': 0, '1901': 1, '1903': 150, '1914': 5}
891(1) {'1895': 1, '1896': 'Reentry', '1897': 'Javelins leave a temporary pool of molten sand where they land.', '1898': 'Javelins leave a big permanent pool of molten sand where they land.', '1899': 'Javelins leave a very big permanent pool of molten sand where they land.', '1900': 0, '1901': 1, '1903': 150, '1914': 2}
892(1) {'1895': 2, '1896': 'Bees!', '1897': 'A swarm of angry bees drifts around the arena.', '1898': 'Two swarms of angry bees drift around the arena.', '1899': 'Three swarms of angry bees drift around the arena.', '1900': 0, '1901': 1, '1903': 150, '1914': 10}
893(1) {'1895': 3, '1896': 'Volatility', '1897': 'Enemies explode on death.', '1898': 'Enemies explode in a large radius on death.', '1899': 'Damaging energy in a large radius on death and leave behind molten sand.', '1900': 0, '1901': 1, '1903': 100, '1914': 0}
894(1) {'1895': 4, '1896': 'Blasphemy', '1897': 'Prayer is drained by 20% of damage received.', '1898': 'Prayer is drained by 40% of damage received.', '1899': 'Prayer is drained by 60% of damage received.', '1900': 0, '1901': 1, '1903': 100, '1914': 4}
897(1) {'1895': 5, '1896': 'Relentless', '1897': 'Enemies never miss and hit an extra 1 damage.', '1898': 'Enemies never miss and hit an extra 3 damage.', '1899': 'Enemies never miss and hit an extra 6 damage.', '1900': 0, '1901': 1, '1903': 200, '1914': 1}
898(1) {'1895': 6, '1896': 'Quartet', '1897': 'An extra random Fremennik Warbander spawns every wave.', '1900': 0, '1901': 0, '1903': 100, '1914': 12}
899(1) {'1895': 7, '1896': 'Totemic', '1897': 'Healing totems spawn in and aid your enemies.', '1900': 0, '1901': 0, '1903': 200, '1914': 8}
900(1) {'1895': 8, '1896': 'Doom', '1897': 'Hits from monsters off-prayer apply doom. Certain death after 20 stacks.', '1900': 0, '1901': 0, '1903': 200, '1914': 9}
901(1) {'1895': 9, '1896': 'Dynamic Duo', '1897': 'Shockwave Colossi always spawn in pairs.', '1900': 0, '1901': 0, '1903': 150, '1914': 11}
902(1) {'1895': 10, '1896': 'Solarflare', '1897': 'Damaging energy orbits an area slowly.', '1898': 'Damaging energy orbits an area quickly and deals more damage.', '1899': 'Damaging energy orbits an area very quickly, deals more damage and disables prayer.', '1900': 0, '1901': 1, '1903': 250, '1914': 3}
903(1) {'1895': 11, '1896': 'Myopia', '1897': 'Your attack range is reduced by 2 tiles.', '1898': 'Your attack range is reduced by 4 tiles.', '1899': 'Your attack range is reduced by 6 tiles.', '1900': 0, '1901': 1, '1903': 200, '1914': 13}
906(1) {'1895': 12, '1896': 'Frailty', '1897': 'Your maximum HP is reduced by 10% and can no longer be boosted.', '1898': 'Your maximum HP is reduced by 20% and can no longer be boosted.', '1899': 'Your maximum HP is reduced by 40% and can no longer be boosted.', '1900': 0, '1901': 1, '1903': 200, '1914': 7}
907(1) {'1895': 13, '1896': 'Red Flag', '1897': 'Minotaurs can no longer be safespotted.', '1900': 0, '1901': 0, '1903': 250, '1914': 6}

params {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Entry Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 46, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of less then 150 considered an Entry raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Beneath Cursed Sands

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Medium
- Hard
- Elite', '1322': 46337, '1323': 9653, '1324': 0, '1325': 174, '1326': 79, '1327': 188, '1328': 0, '1329': 1350}		 {'1313': 'Tombs of Amascut: Entry Mode', '1314': 544, '1315': 48, '1317': 55020183, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Tombs of Amascut can be found in an ancient tomb south of Sophanem.

The Tombs of Amascut is a raid for 1-8 players.

The Tombs of Amascut can scale in difficulty through the use of Invocations. These Invocations change the Raid Level, with a Raid Level of less then 150 considered an Entry raid.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:

params {'1306': 375, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Harder Mode I', '1309': 'Defeat Sotetseg in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode without anyone sharing the ball with anyone, without anyone dying, and without anyone taking damage from any of its other attacks or stepping on the wrong tile in the maze.', '1310': 6, '1311': 2, '1312': 44} {'1306': 375, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Harder Mode I', '1309': 'Defeat Sotetseg in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode without anyone sharing the ball with anyone, without anyone dying, and without anyone taking damage from any of its other attacks or stepping on the wrong tile in the maze.', '1310': 6, '1311': 2, '1312': 46}

params {'1306': 376, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Harder Mode II', '1309': 'Defeat Xarpus in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode after letting the exhumeds heal him to full health and without anyone in the team taking any damage.', '1310': 6, '1311': 2, '1312': 44} {'1306': 376, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Harder Mode II', '1309': 'Defeat Xarpus in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode after letting the exhumeds heal him to full health and without anyone in the team taking any damage.', '1310': 6, '1311': 2, '1312': 46}
3517(1)
params {'1306': 377, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Nylo Sniper', '1309': 'Defeat Verzik Vitur in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode without anyone in your team causing a Nylocas to explode by getting too close.', '1310': 6, '1311': 4, '1312': 44} {'1306': 377, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Nylo Sniper', '1309': 'Defeat Verzik Vitur in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode without anyone in your team causing a Nylocas to explode by getting too close.', '1310': 6, '1311': 4, '1312': 46}
3518(1)
params {'1306': 378, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Team Work Makes the Dream Work', '1309': 'When Verzik Vitur in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode uses her yellow power blast attack while the tornadoes are active, have everyone get through the attack without taking damage. This cannot be completed with one player alive', '1310': 6, '1311': 4, '1312': 44} {'1306': 378, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Team Work Makes the Dream Work', '1309': 'When Verzik Vitur in the Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode uses her yellow power blast attack while the tornadoes are active, have everyone get through the attack without taking damage. params {'1313': 'Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode', '1314': 1520, '1315': 44, '1317': 60247187, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Theatre of Blood is a large arena located within the castle of Ver Sinhaza in Morytania.

The Theatre of Blood is a raid for 1-5 players.

Hard mode is a more challenging experience than the regular raid. Mechanics are harder and more punishing.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Access to Morytania
- At least one regular Theatre of Blood completion

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Master

params {'1313': 'Theatre of Blood: Entry Mode', '1314': 1520, '1315': 42, '1317': 60247187, '1318': 12, '1319': 'The Theatre of Blood is a large arena located within the castle of Ver Sinhaza in Morytania.

The Theatre of Blood is a raid for 1-5 players.

Entry mode is an easier version of the Theatre of Blood aimed at introducing you to the content and the boss mechanics in a less punishing way.

Attack Styles - Magic, Ranged, Melee, Special
Immunities - Poison, Venom
Slayer Categories - None', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:
- Access to Morytania

Immunities - Poison, Venom

params {'1313': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges', '1314': 900, '1315': 49, '1317': 41686007, '1319': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's is an elite Tzhaar warrior found within the inner city of Mor Ul Rek.

TzHaar-Ket-Rak offers a number of challenges where those who have proven themselves within the Fight Caves or the Inferno can go up against an ever increasing number of JalTok-Jads.', '1320': 'Mandatory requirements:

TzHaar-Ket-Rak's First and Second Challenges
- 1 Fight Caves completion

TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Third to Sixth Challenges
- 1 Inferno completion

Combat Achievement task difficulty:
- Elite
- Master
- Grandmaster', '1322': 41571, '1323': 8859, '1324': 20, '1325': 230, '1326': 100, '1327': 150, '1328': 0, '1329': 2000}		 {'1313': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's Challenges', '1314': 900, '1315': 51, '1317': 41686007, '1319': 'TzHaar-Ket-Rak's is an elite Tzhaar warrior found within the inner city of Mor Ul Rek.

4405(1)
params {'1306': 433, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Akkha', '1309': 'Complete Akkha in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Akkha's attacks off-prayer, Akkha's special attacks (orbs, memory, detonate), exploding shadow timers, orbs in the enrage phase or attacking Akkha with the wrong style. Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Akkha invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 47} {'1306': 433, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Akkha', '1309': 'Complete Akkha in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Akkha's attacks off-prayer, Akkha's special attacks (orbs, memory, detonate), exploding shadow timers, orbs in the enrage phase or attacking Akkha with the wrong style. Hits for zero damage still count. You must have all Akkha invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 49}
4406(1)

4407(1)

4408(1)
params {'1306': 436, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Ba-Ba', '1309': 'Defeat Ba-Ba in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Ba-Ba's Attacks off-prayer, Ba-Ba's slam, rolling boulders, rubble attack or falling rocks. Hits for zero damage still count. No sarcophagi may be opened. You must have all Ba-Ba invocations activated.', '1310': 5, '1311': 2, '1312': 47} {'1306': 436, '1307': 3594, '1308': 'Perfect Ba-Ba', '1309': 'Defeat Ba-Ba in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any hits from the following: Ba-Ba's Attacks off-prayer, Ba-Ba's slam, rolling boulders, rubble attack or falling rocks.
